name: testimonial
description: Trust-first review ad: Hook → Story → Result → CTA. ~28s. FTC NOTE: an AI persona may not claim personal experience — this template requires REAL substantiated customer quotes in the brief; the persona presents them as reported results.

beats.title: Hook
beats.goal: Open with the strongest REAL customer result (quoted from the brief, attributed) or a contrarian opinion about the category

beats.title: Story
beats.goal: Presenter relays why people try it: the shared skepticism, then the discovery; product appears naturally

beats.title: Result
beats.goal: Two or three concrete reported outcomes ('customers say…', quoting the brief's substantiated reviews), product in hand

beats.title: Call To Action
beats.goal: Soft-sell recommendation plus where to get it
